# AI in Politics

AI in Politics is written by Jonathan Barnes, CEO of Authentic, co-founder of Quiller, and a Campaigns & Elections AI Leader of the Year and AI Pioneer of the Year.

Jonathan Barnes writes about AI operations for Democratic campaigns and progressive organizations, including human-reviewed workflows, AI-assisted fundraising, campaign infrastructure, staff adoption, campaign knowledge systems, and practical AI governance.

## Key pages

- https://aiinpolitics.ai/jonathan-barnes
- https://aiinpolitics.ai/campaign-ai-operating-system
- https://aiinpolitics.ai/campaign-ai-readiness-scorecard
- https://aiinpolitics.ai/model-ai-use-policy-democratic-campaigns
- https://aiinpolitics.ai/frameworks
- https://aiinpolitics.ai/speaking-awards
- https://aiinpolitics.ai/writing

## Primary topics

- AI operations for Democratic campaigns
- Campaign AI infrastructure
- Human-reviewed AI workflows
- AI-assisted digital fundraising
- Campaign knowledge systems
- AI governance for political firms
- Staff adoption and workflow redesign
- Campaign task routing and approval systems
- Generative AI in political communications
